title: What Price Glory
writer: Maxwell Anderson, Malcolm Stuart Boylan, James T. O'Donohoe
actors: Victor McLaglen, Edmund Lowe, Dolores del Rio
plot: U.S. Marine sergeants Quirt and Flagg are inveterate romantic rivals on peacetime assignments in China and the Philippines. In 1917, W.W. I brings them to France, where Flagg, now a captain, takes up with flirtatious Charmaine, in...
